__comment__: Milestone 2 subset — Array folder in both interpreter and compiled paths. Stage E.2 M1-M4 (2026-04-23) landed the full compile-mode sparse/hole-aware port: $Array inherits List<object?>, creation helpers produce $Array, runtime dispatch uses long-indexed API, built-in emitters honor ECMA-262 hole semantics (forEach/map/filter/reduce/reduceRight/every/some/flat/flatMap/indexOf/includes/toReversed/with/toSpliced/at/join). `compiledExcludeFolders` cleared; baseline regen planned.
